title: Homepage loads and displays hero marketing content
description: Verifies the landing page renders key hero marketing content for first-time visitors.

title: Primary CTA leads to the loan application start page
description: Verifies clicking the main call-to-action takes the user from the homepage to the /apply page.

title: Check offers successfully from /check-offers and view pre-qualified offers
description: Verifies a user can submit valid pre-qualification details on /check-offers and see an offers list showing APR and monthly payment.

steps.description: Type "Jordan" into the first name input field
Type "Taylor" into the last name input field
Type "jordan.taylor@example.com" into the email input field
Type "85000" into the annual income field
Type "720" into the estimated credit score field
Verify a pre-qualified offers list is visible with APR and monthly payment

title: Check offers successfully from /prequalify alias route and view offers
description: Verifies the /prequalify route works as an alias to the pre-qualification form and shows offers after submission.

steps.description: Verify text "Check My Offers" is visible
Type "Avery" into the first name input field
Type "Nguyen" into the last name input field
Type "avery.nguyen@example.com" into the email input field
Type "64000" into the annual income field
Type "690" into the estimated credit score field
Verify a pre-qualified offers list is visible with APR and monthly payment

title: Required field validation: missing email blocks submission on /prequalify
description: Verifies the form shows a required-field validation message when email is missing.

steps.description: Type "Sam" into the first name input field
Type "Patel" into the last name input field
Verify a validation error message indicating the email field is required is visible

title: Required field validation: submit with all fields blank shows errors
description: Verifies submitting the empty form displays required-field validation messages and does not show offers.

steps.description: Verify a validation error message indicating the first name field is required is visible
Verify a validation error message indicating the last name field is required is visible
Verify a validation error message indicating the email field is required is visible

title: Input validation: non-numeric annual income prevents successful submission
description: Verifies annual income rejects non-numeric input and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "Riley" into the first name input field
Type "Chen" into the last name input field
Type "riley.chen@example.com" into the email input field
Type "eighty thousand" into the annual income field
Type "710" into the estimated credit score field
Verify a validation error message indicating annual income must be a number is visible

title: Input validation: credit score outside expected range shows an error
description: Verifies an out-of-range credit score displays a validation error and prevents showing offers.

steps.description: Type "Morgan" into the first name input field
Type "Lee" into the last name input field
Type "morgan.lee@example.com" into the email input field
Type "90000" into the annual income field
Type "999" into the estimated credit score field
Verify a validation error message indicating the credit score is invalid is visible

title: Double-submit protection: clicking Check My Offers twice does not duplicate results
description: Verifies repeated clicking does not create duplicated offers content and the results area remains stable.

steps.description: Type "Jamie" into the first name input field
Type "Brooks" into the last name input field
Type "jamie.brooks@example.com" into the email input field
Type "78000" into the annual income field
Type "730" into the estimated credit score field
Verify a pre-qualified offers list is visible with APR and monthly payment

title: Attempt to submit with only personal information and verify validation blocks submission
description: Verifies the application cannot be submitted when required steps/fields beyond personal info are incomplete and the user is shown a visible validation message.

steps.description: Fill personal information (name, email, phone, DOB, SSN)

title: Apply page loads and shows loan application form
description: Verifies the /apply page renders the loan application form with its first step visible and an input area for the applicant.

steps.description: Verify element "loan application form" is visible

title: Changing loan type updates the application state without losing entered information
description: Verifies that the user can change the selected loan type during the application and previously entered values remain present.

steps.description: Fill personal information (name, email, phone, DOB, SSN)
Select a different loan type from dropdown

title: Invalid loan amount is rejected with a visible message
description: Verifies that entering an invalid loan amount prevents progress/submission and shows a visible validation message.

title: Payment History page loads and shows heading and sign-in prompt
description: Verifies the Payment History page renders the page heading and prompts unauthenticated users to sign in to view their payment records.

steps.description: Verify element "sign in button" is visible

title: Payment History unauthenticated state shows no-payments message
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user on /payment-history sees an appropriate empty state message prompting them to sign in.

steps.description: Verify text "No payments yet" is visible

title: Payment History page shows heading and subtitle text
description: Verifies the Payment History page renders the Payment History heading and subtitle visible to unauthenticated users. The export button is only visible after login.

steps.description: Verify text "View and manage" is visible

title: Payment History sign-in link navigates to login page
description: Verifies that clicking the Sign In button on the unauthenticated Payment History page navigates the user to the login page.

title: Submit contact form successfully with all required fields
description: Verifies a user can submit a contact inquiry and sees a success confirmation message.

steps.description: Type "Alex Johnson" into the name field
Select "General Inquiry" from the inquiry type dropdown
Type "I have a question about your loan options and eligibility requirements." into the message field

title: Validation: block submission when message is blank
description: Verifies the form shows a validation error when the message field is left empty.

steps.description: Type "Taylor Smith" into the name field
Select "Support" from the inquiry type dropdown

title: Validation: block submission when email is missing
description: Verifies the form prevents submission and prompts for an email address when it is not provided.

steps.description: Type "Jordan Lee" into the name field
Select "General Inquiry" from the inquiry type dropdown
Type "Please contact me regarding repayment schedules." into the message field

title: Validation: show error for invalid email format
description: Verifies the form flags an improperly formatted email address.

steps.description: Type "Morgan Davis" into the name field
Select "General Inquiry" from the inquiry type dropdown
Type "Testing invalid email validation." into the message field

title: Validation: block submission when name is missing
description: Verifies the form prevents submission and prompts for a name when it is not provided.

steps.description: Select "Support" from the inquiry type dropdown
Type "I need help accessing my account." into the message field

title: Form UX: successful submission clears form or disables resubmission
description: Verifies that after a successful submit, the UI indicates completion and offers the user the option to send another message.

steps.description: Type "Riley Chen" into the name field
Select "Partnership" from the Subject dropdown (value partnership)
Type "I am interested in partnership opportunities." into the message field
Verify text "Send Another Message" is visible

title: Edge case: message accepts longer text without UI breaking
description: Verifies the message field can accept a long inquiry and still submit or validate normally.

steps.description: Type "Avery Nguyen" into the name field
Select "General Inquiry" from the inquiry type dropdown

Type "This is a longer inquiry intended to verify that the contact form message field supports substantial content without truncation or UI issues. Please provide details about available loan terms, repayment options, and any fees that may apply. Also include guidance on pre-qualification and required documentation." into the message field

title: Open AI support chat from the Home page and receive an AI response
description: Verifies the chat widget can be opened from the landing page, a question can be sent, and an AI response is shown in the conversation.

steps.description: Click chat bubble icon to open
Type "What are your loan rates?" into the chat input field
Verify text "What are your loan rates?" is visible
Verify element "AI-generated response message" is visible

title: Send a second message in the same chat session and receive another AI response
description: Verifies multi-turn chat works without closing the widget and responses continue to appear.

steps.description: Click chat bubble icon to open
Type "How long does approval take?" into the chat input field
Verify element "AI-generated response message" is visible
Type "What documents do I need?" into the chat input field
Verify element "AI-generated response message" is visible

title: Close and reopen the chat widget from the Home page
description: Verifies the widget can be dismissed and opened again from the same page without navigation.

steps.description: Click chat bubble icon to open
Verify element "chat widget" is not visible
Click chat bubble icon to open

title: Attempt to send an empty message
description: Verifies the chat prevents sending blank input and shows a validation message or keeps the send action disabled.

steps.description: Click chat bubble icon to open

title: Send a very long question and verify the UI remains usable
description: Verifies the widget accepts a long prompt and still displays the user message and an AI response without breaking the layout.

steps.description: Click chat bubble icon to open

Type "I have a detailed question about eligibility, income requirements, credit score ranges, repayment schedules, fees, prepayment penalties, and how co-signers affect my APR. Please explain step by step." into the chat input field
Verify text "I have a detailed question about eligibility" is visible
Verify element "AI-generated response message" is visible

title: About page loads and allows navigation to How It Works via in-page link
description: Verifies the About page renders visible content and a user can navigate to How It Works using a page link.

steps.description: Scroll to the middle of the page
Click on the link "How It Works"
Verify text "How It Works" is visible

title: How It Works page shows process description content
description: Verifies the How It Works page loads and displays lending process information.

steps.description: Verify text "How It Works" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Rates page renders rate information content
description: Verifies the Rates page loads and displays rate-related information to the user.

steps.description: Scroll to the middle of the page

title: Resources listing page loads and shows a list of resources
description: Verifies the Resources page renders and displays a visible list of articles/resources.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Open a resource article from the Resources listing
description: Verifies a user can open an article detail page from the Resources list and see article content.

steps.description: Click on the first visible article title in the list

title: Non-existent resource slug shows 404 page
description: Verifies that navigating to an invalid resources article path results in the 404 not found page.

title: Careers page loads and shows job application section
description: Verifies the Careers page renders and exposes a job application area for users.

steps.description: Scroll to the middle of the page

title: Legal documents page is reachable via a known static route (skip dynamic)
description: Verifies that legal content is accessible only via available static routes; dynamic legal routes are not directly navigated in this plan.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: OTP Login page loads and renders phone/email input
description: Verifies the /login page renders an authentication form for entering a phone number or email to receive a one-time passcode.

steps.description: Verify element "phone or email input" is visible

title: OTP Login: submitting blank phone/email shows validation error
description: Verifies that clicking Send Code without entering a phone or email shows a required-field validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Send Code" button without entering any input
Verify a validation error message is visible

title: OTP Login: entering invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies the OTP login form rejects a malformed email and shows a format error.

steps.description: Type "notanemail" into the phone or email input field
Verify a validation error message about valid email or phone is visible

title: Dashboard page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies that navigating to /dashboard without a session redirects the user to the login or OTP page.

title: User Dashboard page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies that /user-dashboard requires authentication and redirects to the login page when no session exists.

title: Profile page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies that /profile is a protected route and unauthenticated users are redirected to the login page.

title: Notifications page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies the /notifications route requires authentication and redirects to the login page.

title: Support Center page loads and displays support options
description: Verifies /support renders a visible support center page with help categories or contact channels.

steps.description: Verify element "support options or categories" is visible

title: Pay Fee page loads and displays fee payment form
description: Verifies /pay-fee renders the fee payment interface without an authenticated session (checking the page shell at minimum).

title: Referrals page requires authentication and redirects to login
description: Verifies /referrals is a protected page and redirects unauthenticated users to login.

title: Bank Accounts page requires authentication and redirects to login
description: Verifies /bank-accounts is a protected route and redirects unauthenticated users to login.

title: Hardship Programs page loads and displays hardship options
description: Verifies /hardship renders a page with visible hardship program information or application section.

steps.description: Verify element "hardship program details" is visible

title: Financial Tools page loads and shows calculator or tool UI
description: Verifies /financial-tools renders relevant financial calculators or tools to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "calculator or tool" is visible

title: Virtual Card page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies /virtual-card is a protected page that redirects to login when no session is present.

title: Settings page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies /settings is a protected route requiring authentication.

title: Admin page redirects non-admin users to login
description: Verifies /admin is a protected admin-only route and redirects unauthenticated users to the login page.

title: Legal document route renders privacy or terms content
description: Verifies /legal/privacy-policy renders readable legal content on screen.

steps.description: Verify element "legal document content" is visible

title: Legal document route renders terms of service content
description: Verifies /legal/terms-of-service renders the terms of service legal document text to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "legal document content" is visible

title: Co-Signers page redirects unauthenticated users to login
description: Verifies /co-signers requires authentication and redirects to the login page when no session exists.

title: Navigation header is visible and links are present on the homepage
description: Verifies the site-wide navigation header renders on the homepage with primary navigation links.
